name: Savory Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a roaster, heat the oil and brown the pot roast on all sides.
2. Remove excess fat from the pan.
3. Stir in the mushroom soup, onion soup mix, and water.
4. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer until the meat is tender.
5. Add the vegetables (potatoes and carrots) and cover again. Cook for 40 minutes or until both the meat and vegetables are tender.
6. Remove the meat and vegetables to a serving platter.
7. Mix the flour with 1/4 cup water to form a slurry, then gradually stir into the liquid in the pan.
8. Cook until thickened. Serve with the meat and vegetables.
